---
title: "Dashboard Test"
author: "MLBoss"
logo: https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/fr/1/10/Logo_Insee.svg

---


```{python}
from src import helpers
dict_ = helpers.read_data("s3://projet-ape/log_files/dashboard_test/**/*.parquet")
data = dict_["data"]
values = dict_["values"]
```

## Row

```{python}
#| component: valuebox
#| title: "Nombre de liasses"
dict(
    icon = "U+1F4C3",
    color = "secondary",
    value = values["TotalRows"][0]
)
```


```{python}
#| component: valuebox
#| title: "Pourcentage de codification automatique"
dict(
    icon = "U+2705",
    color = "secondary",
    value = values["PercentageHighIC"][0]
)
```

## Row

### Column {width=100%}

```{python}
#| title: Distribution des indices de confiances
#| padding: 0
helpers.make_chart(data)
```
